subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! Thou beholdest the tearful eyes of Thy loved ones, their burning and sorrowful hearts, and their weeping [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی تری اعین احبائک الباکیه و قلوبهم المحترقه الشاکیه و عبراتهم
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort, @power of prayer, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
